package rulecoverage

func NegativeRandNewPerCall() string {
    ruleID := "rand_new_per_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`rand.New(...)` inside regular call paths instead of reusing a generator."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
